span.p:
reads log history,
tunes prompts / guardrails

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(13, 44, 13) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(13, 44, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧪 Tester / Evaluator
tests/test_agent.py + test_reliability.py
fake Gemini client
(no network, deterministic)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Guardrail test cases:
- out-of-range numerics get clamped
- unknown genre/mood falls back
- non-retryable error → fails closed
- explanation is grounded in retrieved data

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 Agent — PLAN
extract_profile()
Gemini API call, forced function-calling schema
(genre/mood enums built from catalog)

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🛡️ Guardrail — CHECK
- clamp numeric fields to valid range
- fall back unknown genre/mood to catalog default
- retry transient API errors (backoff)
- fail closed on non-retryable errors
- compute confidence score from correction count

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔎 Retriever / Scorer
recommend_songs()
src/recommender.py
scores every song 0–100 + reasons

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 Agent — EXPLAIN
explain_recommendations()
Gemini API call, grounded ONLY in the
retrieved (song, score, reasons) list

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Output to user
ranked recommendations + grounded explanation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
User
(free-text taste description)
e.g. 'something moody for a rainy afternoon'

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📝 logs/agent.log
every extraction, guardrail correction,
retry, and failure is recorded

div.style: color: rgb(13, 44, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
👤 User
reads recommendations + explanation
may re-describe taste if unsatisfied

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚠️ Fail closed
user-facing error message
(no crash, no silent bad data)
